case_title: SYLWESTER SLOJEWSKI VS. PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY $4,725.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,725.00, CONSIDERING COMPETENT EVIDENCE AND POLICY PROVISIONS WITH $500.00 DEDUCTIBLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-25-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2022 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF SYLWESTER SLOJEWSKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY, REPRESENTED BY ELIO GARCIA, SUPERVISOR MANGER REPAIR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ELIO GARCIA, SUPERVISOR MANAGED REPAIR FILED BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2022 - JUDGMENT.(PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 12-9-22)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: CT CORPORATION SYSTEM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLOJEWSKI, SYLWESTER AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY
